name: attack_nearest_hostile
description: Engage the nearest hostile mob within range using current weapon, or kite if overwhelmed
parameters: z.object({ maxSearchRadius: z.number().int().min(2).max(40).default(12).describe("Radius to scan for hostile mobs"), engageDistance: z.number().min(1.5).max(5).default(2.5).describe("Target distance to maintain while attacking"), weaponName: z.string().default("stone_sword").describe("Name of preferred weapon in inventory to equip"), kiteHealthThreshold: z.number().int().min(0).max(20).default(8).describe("Kite away if health drops to this level") })

name: attack_hostile_by_id
description: Attack a specific hostile mob using current weapon
parameters: z.object({ targetEntityId: z.union([z.number().int(), z.string()]).describe("The entity ID of the hostile mob to attack."), weaponName: z.string().describe("The name of the weapon to use, e.g., 'stone_sword'."), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(120000).default(60000).describe("The maximum time in milliseconds to continue the attack.") })

name: attack_hostile_with_bow
description: Attack nearest hostile mob with bow and arrow, dealing ranged damage
parameters:
z.object({
  engageDistance: z.number().int().min(5).max(40).default(12).describe("Maximum distance from the target to allow shooting."),
  maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(30000).default(5000).describe("Maximum time the background task will remain active."),
  maxSearchRadius: z.number().int().min(5).max(64).default(15).describe("Radius to look for the nearest hostile mob."),
  maxShots: z.number().int().min(1).max(20).default(5).describe("Maximum number of arrows to fire before the task completes."),
  holdDrawMs: z.number().int().min(600).max(1500).default(1100).describe("Active milliseconds to hold the bow draw for full power.")
})

name: move_to_player
description: Move toward a target player to maintain close proximity for defensive cooperation
parameters: z.object({ targetPlayerId: z.union([z.number().int(), z.string()]).optional().describe("The entity ID of the target player to follow"), targetPlayerName: z.string().optional().describe("The username of the target player to follow"), followDistanceBlocks: z.number().min(0).max(10).default(3).describe("Desired distance to maintain from the target player"), stopRangeBlocks: z.number().min(0).max(5).default(1.5).describe("Minimum distance to stop to avoid pushing the target") })

name: kite_nearest_hostile
description: Back away from the nearest hostile while using bow for ranged attacks and keeping distance
parameters: z.object({ maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(60000).default(8000).describe("Total active time for the kiting behavior"), minHealth: z.number().min(0).max(20).default(6).describe("Stop kiting and retreat if health falls below this threshold"), preferredDistance: z.number().min(3).max(20).default(8).describe("Maintain this distance from the nearest hostile"), retreatStepBlocks: z.number().min(1).max(5).default(2).describe("Distance to move back in each retreat step"), holdDrawMs: z.number().int().min(600).max(1500).default(1100).describe("How long to hold the bow for each shot") })
